parameters.subject: =New Lead: {{ $json.body.businessName }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone_number: '{{ $env.SECRET_VALUE }}', template: 'lead-intake', variables: { BUSINESS_NAME: $json.businessName, INDUSTRY: $json.industry, OWNER_NAME: $json.ownerName, PHONE: $json.phone } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $input.all()[0].json;

const intake = {
  client_name: lead.businessName || 'Unknown',
  contact_name: lead.ownerName || '',
  contact_email: lead.email || '',
  industry: lead.industry || '',
  q01_workflow_name: `${lead.industry || 'Business'} Process Automation`,
  q02_trigger_event: `New ${lead.package || 'automation'} request from ${lead.businessName || 'client'}`,
  q03_business_objective: `Automate key ${lead.industry || 'business'} workflows to reduce manual effort and improve efficiency`,
  q06_runs_per_period: 50,
  q06_period_unit: 'day',
  q07_avg_trigger_to_end: 15,
  q07_time_unit: 'minutes',
  q10_systems_involved: ['email', 'crm'],
  lead_source: 'web',
  urgency: 'medium',
  notes: lead.notes || ''
};

return { json: { intake, intakeJson: JSON.stringify(intake) } };

assignments.name: client_callback_skip_reason
assignments.value: Synthetic / test / health-monitor traffic — outbound call suppressed

meta.summary: Production-style form receiver with validation, notification, and downstream handoff.
